title: piece_brief
description: Structured writer brief for a single editorial run (SPEC §7.6, §13). v1: minimal contract; optional archetype id aligns with bundled taxonomy (SPEC §8).

editorial_archetype_id.description: Stable id from bundled editorial archetype taxonomy v1 (SPEC §8). Must stay aligned with piece_label.schema.json $defs.editorial_archetype_id.

run_id.description: Editorial run id (same as run manifest run_id, SPEC §12.1).

thesis.description: Core claim or angle for the piece.

audience_assumptions.description: Who the reader is and what they already know (SPEC §7.6).

constraints.description: Hard limits, compliance, length, or must-avoid topics.

required_citations.description: Sources that must appear or be honored (urls, titles, or internal ids).

candidate_analogs.description: Historical pieces or episodes to echo (paths, ids, or short labels).

implications_to_explore.description: Downstream angles or second-order points worth covering.

tone_target.description: House voice / register guidance for drafting.

primary_archetype_id.description: Chosen editorial archetype when framing has committed to one.
